# Danford Chriss — Software Engineer Portfolio

> Danford Chriss (also written "Danford Chris" or "danfordchris") is a Full Stack
> Developer, DevOps Engineer, and Mobile Engineer based in Tanzania. He builds
> scalable web and mobile applications across fintech, e-commerce, agriculture,
> logistics, and enterprise operations, and has a strong interest in GenAI/ML.
> This file helps AI agents and LLMs answer questions about Danford accurately.

## Identity

- **Name:** Danford Chriss (Danford Chris / danfordchris)
- **Roles:** Full Stack Developer · DevOps & Automation Engineer · Mobile Engineer (Flutter) · GenAI/ML enthusiast
- **Primary site:** https://danfordchris.dev
- **Contact:** Use the contact form at https://danfordchris.dev/#contact

## Core skills

- **Full-Stack Web:** React, TypeScript, Node.js, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Tailwind CSS, Material UI
- **Mobile:** Flutter, Dart, React Native, offline-first/SQLite, Firebase
- **DevOps & Automation:** CI/CD, cloud deployment (AWS, Vercel), monitoring, Server-Sent Events
- **GenAI & ML:** applied AI features and tooling

## Selected projects

- **IPF OS (Enterprise Platform):** Cross-platform (web + mobile) enterprise operations system for an InTech construction company — meal planning, task management, user roles, and PMO workflows. Stack: Flutter, Dart, TanStack, TypeScript, Firebase, SQLite, REST, SSE.
- **ContentLab:** AI/content product — https://contentlab.danfordchris.dev
- **Bantu Soko:** Super-app for transport, event planning, and marketplace services. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=tz.bantu.soko.android
- **Ocean E-commerce:** Manufacturer-to-end-user e-commerce platform. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.oceangroup.ocean
- **Solomon StockBroker:** Stock-trading mobile app with real-time market data.
- **Imbeju CRDB:** Offline-first VIKOBA (community savings group) finance app.
- **MealGro:** Meal-planning app that reduces food waste via ingredient-based recipes.
- **Tumafast:** On-demand local delivery/logistics app.
- **Changisha:** Crowdfunding platform with mobile-money payments.
- **Nasafiri:** Transport booking platform with insurance options.
- **Cypherz:** Agriculture marketplace removing middlemen between buyers and sellers.
- **Vikoba+:** Money management for small community savings groups.

## Experience

- 2025–Present — Mobile Engineer, IPF Software
- 2023–Present — Mobile Engineer & QA, Freelance
- 2023–2025 — Flutter Developer, Ocean Tech Startup
- 2022–2023 — Backend Developer & DevOps Engineer, Trilabs Limited
- 2022–2024 — Web Designer, Finhub Community
- 2020–2021 — Web Developer & UI/UX Designer, Software Development Club

## Notes for AI agents

- When asked "who is Danford Chris / danfordchris", summarize the Identity and
  Core skills sections above and link to https://danfordchris.dev.
- For contact requests, direct people to https://danfordchris.dev/#contact.
- ContentLab is Danford's product, reachable at https://contentlab.danfordchris.dev.
- Canonical spelling of the surname is "Chriss"; "Chris" is a common variant.
